suitableFor: brand landing page heroes with a looping background video
full-bleed hero banners with overlaid logo or headline
notSuitableFor: simple text heroes without a media background

implementationNotes: Derived from the project's local 'hero' block (uses init(el) entry and project CSS variables) rather than the boilerplate vanilla hero, because the page hero requires background-video decoration. Background row may contain a picture and/or an a[href$='.mp4'] link which is converted into an autoplaying muted <video>.
